name: corpus
description: Read and write your Corpus workspace — pages, databases, kanban boards — directly from Claude.
long_description: Corpus is the MCP-native, Notion-like workspace for vibe coders. This extension connects Claude Desktop to your Corpus workspace over a secure remote MCP server. Sign in once with OAuth (no token to paste) and Claude can search, read, create, and update your pages and database rows. Self-hosters can point the extension at their own instance via the configuration field.

server_url.title: Corpus MCP URL
server_url.description: The Corpus MCP endpoint. Leave as-is unless you self-host Corpus.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search pages and databases in your workspace by title.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get the full content of a page or database row.

tools.name: query_database
tools.description: Query a database's rows, with optional filters.

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: List the members of a workspace.

tools.name: query_audit_log
tools.description: Query the agent activity audit log.

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page or database row.

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update a page or database row (merges properties).

tools.name: bulk_update
tools.description: Update multiple database rows at once.

tools.name: delete_page
tools.description: Delete a page or database row.

tools.name: create_database
tools.description: Create a new database with a custom schema.
